title: February 8
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 8''' is the 39th day of the year. There are 326 days remaining, 327 in leap years.</noinclude>

*[[1930s|1930]] – [[Doug Robinson]] is born.
*[[1930s#1932|1932]] – [[John Williams]] is born.
*[[1940s#1941|1941]] – [[Nick Nolte]] is born.
*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[Ethan Phillips]] is born.
*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[Aaron McClellan]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Mike Massa]] is born.
*1968 – [[April Stewart]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Brendan Wayne]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Seth Green]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Sharon Duncan-Brewster]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 1|''Star Wars Weekly'' 1]] published.
*[[1979]] – [[Josh Keaton]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Liam McIntyre]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 34|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 34]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 138|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 138]] published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' releases on the Windows platform.
*[[2006]] – [[Empire 39|''Empire'' 39]] published.
*2006 – [[Republic 83|''Republic'' 83]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars III: The Clone Wars]]'' is announced.
*[[2012]] – [[Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse 3|''Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse'' 3]] published.
*2012 – [[Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 4|''Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost'' 4]] published.
*2012 – [[Knights of the Old Republic: War 2|''Knights of the Old Republic: War'' 2]] published.
*2012 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: A Long Time Ago.... Volume 5]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – "[[Sabotage (episode)|Sabotage]]" airs in Canada.
*[[2017]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 4|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 4]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars: Yoda's Puzzles]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Princess Leia – The Rescue]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends: Rise of the Sith Omnibus]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: Inner Jedi]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – "[[The Clone Conspiracy]]" and "[[Truth and Consequences]]" air on [[Disney+]].
*2023 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 31|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 31]] published.
*2023 – [[Hidden Empire 3|''Hidden Empire'' 3]]'' published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic (2022) 5|''The High Republic'' (2022) 5]] published.
*[[2025]] – "[[RJ Makes a Friend]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
